title: murraya caloxylon
intro: Murraya caloxylon, also known as the Chinese box or orange jasmine, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Murraya caloxylon include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Murraya caloxylon is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
